playbook.intent: Risk of architectural drift → 45-min weekly review with explicit pattern-promotion + ADR queue + design-doc updates.
playbook.scope: Architect + 2-3 senior engineers walk the week's significant PRs and open RFCs. Goal: spot drift early (cross-service coupling, layering violations, missed reuse), promote good patterns to team `patterns.md`, queue ADRs for decisions worth memorialising. 45-minute hard stop. Output is a written set of queued ADRs + pattern-promotions + design-doc deltas.

success-criteria.criterion: Significant PRs walked with architectural lens

stage.name: Rank + walk
stage.intent: Rank the week's PRs by architectural impact; walk the top of the list.

tasks.task: Rank by architectural-impact score (cross-service, new dep, new pattern, etc.)

outputs.output: Ranked PR list with impact scores

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the top 5-10 are walked. Don't extend the session to cover bottom-of-list items.

stage.name: Spot drift + promote patterns
stage.intent: Flag drift; promote what we want repeated; queue ADRs for decisions.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when each drift signal has an owner. Unassigned drift evaporates by next review.

stage.name: Queue ADRs
stage.intent: Decisions worth memorialising land in the ADR queue.

tasks.task: Identify decisions made implicitly in PRs
Queue ADRs to be written by named owners

outputs.output: ADR queue with owners + due dates

stage.decision-gate: Required output: queued ADRs with owners. Verbal agreement = drift in 2 weeks.

extra.value: [PR-level review — see pr-review-with-junior-mentoring, Cross-quarter strategy — see quarter-planning-okr-reset, Incident postmortems — see incident-postmortem-preventive-backlog]
[Graph-vs-diff reviewer tooling in place, patterns.md + mistakes.md in repo, ADR convention adopted by team]

[Review drifts into PR-level critique — wrong altitude, Patterns promoted without writing them down — repeat next week, ADRs noted in chat — lost by next sprint, Session extends to 90 min — kills attendance]
['Did we update patterns.md or mistakes.md this week?', 'Did we hold the 45-minute stop?', 'Does every queued ADR have an owner?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-architectural-review --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-architectural-review --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-architectural-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
